query_log.query: 2026-03-23 Reuters 米株引け 米10年 ドル円 原油 日経
2026-03-23 TDnet シンカ フリークHD 資本業務提携 業績予想修正
2026-03-23 Reuters KADOKAWA Oasis 明海グループ ホルムズ

snapshot: The Nikkei ended the morning session at 51,582.23, down 1,790.30, with both the Nikkei and TOPIX setting fresh year-to-date lows.
At the midday break, Prime-market breadth was 91 gainers, 1,473 losers and 19 unchanged. More than 90% of the market was still down.
Chicago Nikkei 225 futures were 51,060, down 1,930 versus Osaka day session. The break below the 53,000 zone remains the key stress point.
USD/JPY stayed in the low 159s, the U.S. 10-year yield reached 4.4110%, and Japan's 10-year yield hit 2.305% in the morning. Higher yields remain a headwind for growth.
Brent stayed near $111.90. Relative strength is not in the index today but in a narrow set of names with activist, partnership or company-specific catalysts.

drivers.driver: A break below 53,000 is the key supply-demand fault line
drivers.why_today: In Reuters' strategist comment, a deeper move below 53,000 in the Nikkei was described as the point where margin-call selling risk rises materially, with 50,000 seen as a downside guide.

drivers.driver: A war-risk regime of oil, yields and a weaker yen
drivers.why_today: Higher oil and higher U.S. yields are keeping global risk-off pressure in place. Yen weakness remains, but cost inflation is making it difficult for broad domestic defensives to hold up.

drivers.driver: Only explainable stock-specific catalysts are still working
drivers.why_today: Capital is concentrating in names with simple, visible catalysts such as KADOKAWA on Oasis, Stella Pharma on the China treatment start, and Shinka on the SB C&S tie-up.

headline_inventory.headline: Chicago Nikkei 225 futures were 51,060, down 1,930 versus the Osaka day session
Asian equities slid sharply while the U.S. 10-year hit 4.4110%, USD/JPY traded around 159.15, and Brent stayed near $111.90
The Nikkei finished the morning session at 51,582.23, down 1,790.30, with both the Nikkei and TOPIX setting new year-to-date lows
MUFG eSmart Securities said that if the Nikkei breaks materially below 53,000, 50,000 becomes the next downside guide
USD/JPY held in the low 159s as Japan's top FX official said the government was ready to respond 'on all fronts'
KADOKAWA rose against the tape after Oasis was found to hold 8.86%, making it the top Prime-market gainer at 9:45 JST
Shinka disclosed a capital and business alliance with SB C&S, expanding the relationship into a longer-term partnership that includes on-market share purchases
Stella Pharma disclosed the start of treatment at the Pengbo (Hainan) BNCT Center in China
FreakOut revised FY September 2026 guidance upward after announcing the sale of investment securities
Meikai Group hit limit-up on tanker-rate strength, with some traders arguing that short-term money rotated away from Kyoei Tanker
Fuji Media Holdings traded higher on renewed buying by the Murakami side

watchlist.name: KADOKAWA
watchlist.why_today: Oasis was disclosed as an 8.86% holder. At 9:45 JST the stock was the top Prime-market gainer, making the relative strength stand out in a collapsing tape.
watchpoints: Can it remain near the top of Prime gainers into the late morning session
Can dip-buying hold around the 3,300 yen area
Does the move remain stock-specific rather than sector-led
falsifiers: It fails to hold positive territory and the move fades into a short-lived headline trade
The market stops extending the story beyond the stake disclosure itself
watchlist.red_team: No concrete demand is visible yet, so the move can still fade after the initial surprise.

sources.title: ホットストック：ＫＡＤＯＫＡＷＡが逆行高、オアシスが大株主に
カドカワは逆行高、オアシスが大量保有

watchlist.name: Stella Pharma
watchlist.why_today: It disclosed the first BNCT treatment in China at 10:00 JST and then moved straight to limit-up. Freshness of news and price confirmation are both present.
watchpoints: Can it stay near limit-up and move toward a full lock
Does the market keep valuing the China clinical-data angle
Can the stock keep attracting theme buying despite broad growth weakness
falsifiers: The move is treated as a one-shot headline and the limit-up breaks
Small-cap biotech profit-taking turns it into a pure volatility trade
watchlist.red_team: The theme is strong, but biotech names can reverse quickly once profit-taking starts.

sources.title: ステラファ(4888) 鵬博(海南)BNCTセンターでの治療開始に関するお知らせ
ステラファはＳ高で昨年来高値を連日更新、中国で第１例目のＢＮＣＴでの治療を実施

watchlist.name: Shinka
watchlist.why_today: The SB C&S capital and business alliance is still driving follow-through. At the midday break the stock was among the Growth-market limit-up names.
watchpoints: Can it keep the 1,000 yen area and hold limit-up conditions
Does turnover remain active enough to support continuation buying
Does the distribution-network story keep extending into earnings expectations
falsifiers: Profit-taking from the prior run finally takes over
The market treats the tie-up as too distant from near-term earnings
watchlist.red_team: The strategic direction is good, but near-term numeric impact is still not easy to see.

sources.title: シンカ(149A) SB C&S株式会社との資本業務提携に関するお知らせ
東証グロース（前引け）＝値下がり優勢、シンカ、インフォメテがS高

watchlist.name: Meikai Group
watchlist.why_today: It hit limit-up on tanker-rate strength. Some traders also argue that tighter rules on Kyoei Tanker are pushing short-term money into Meikai instead.
watchpoints: Can it stay near limit-up into the afternoon
Does the rotation away from Kyoei Tanker keep flowing into Meikai
Does buying remain concentrated in the name rather than the full sector
falsifiers: A calmer oil or war headline strips away the theme bid
The move quickly fades once the short-term rotation slows
watchlist.red_team: This is a theme-led move, so the life of the trade can be short.

sources.title: 明海グループが大幅高で５日連続の大陽線、タンカー関連株への投資マネー攻勢続く◇
＜動意株・２３日＞（前引け）＝ステラファ、明海グループ、フリークＨＤ

watchlist.name: Fuji Media Holdings
watchlist.why_today: Renewed buying by the Murakami side became visible again. The stock is trading up against a very weak market, reviving the shareholder-action angle.
watchpoints: Can buying continue around the 4,000 yen area
Does activist-driven interest broaden beyond KADOKAWA
Can the stock stay positive into the afternoon
falsifiers: The move fades quickly once the shareholder-filing surprise is digested
The market stops extrapolating any change scenario from the new filing
watchlist.red_team: The activist angle is strong, but any concrete change could still take time to emerge.

sources.title: フジＨＤが逆行高演じる、村上氏側による再度買い増しで思惑
フジメディア---大幅反発、エスグラントコーポの保有比率が上昇

watchlist.name: FreakOut Holdings
watchlist.why_today: The investment-security sale and FY guidance raise remain a clean numeric catalyst. The stock is still positive despite the broad selloff.
watchpoints: Can it absorb selling around the 700 yen area
Does the market keep looking through the one-off element and reward the operating-profit uplift
Can it stay positive while the broader Growth market remains weak
falsifiers: The move is dismissed as a special-factor gain
Weakness across small-cap growth names overwhelms the stock-specific story
watchlist.red_team: If investors question the quality of the upgrade, follow-through buying may stay limited.

sources.title: フリークＨＤ(6094) 投資有価証券の売却及び業績予想の修正に関するお知らせ
フリークＨＤ---急騰、投資有価証券の売却及び業績予想の修正を発表

deep_dive.title: KADOKAWA: In a washout tape, test whether the activist surprise can keep leading

lines: When more than 90% of the market is down, simple and forceful catalysts such as shareholder-structure change or capital-policy pressure can matter more than ordinary earnings narratives.
KADOKAWA has enough liquidity and a clear re-rating angle through the Oasis stake disclosure.
Reuters reported that at 9:45 JST KADOKAWA was the top Prime-market gainer, with Oasis' 8.86% holding treated as the catalyst.
The weaker the overall market becomes, the easier it is to judge whether this is genuine relative strength or only a brief headline pop.
Can it hold around the 3,300 yen area instead of fading after the opening burst.
Does volume remain concentrated in the stock itself rather than spread across the sector.
The stock fails to stay positive and the move fades into a short-lived news trade.
The market does not extend the story beyond the stake disclosure itself.
The content of any future demand or company response is still unknown, so expectations are running ahead of specifics.
If the market selloff deepens further, even relative-strength names can be hit by profit-taking.

sources.title: ホットストック：ＫＡＤＯＫＡＷＡが逆行高、オアシスが大株主に
カドカワは逆行高、オアシスが大量保有
〔マーケットアイ〕株式：前場の日経平均は大幅続落、年初来安値 中東紛争長期化懸念で

no_trade_conditions: If the Nikkei breaks materially below 53,000 and forced selling becomes the dominant tape
If KADOKAWA or Shinka fail to hold positive territory and their relative-strength case disappears
If oil or Hormuz headlines reverse sharply and break the thematic premise for Meikai Group
If official rhetoric causes a sharp FX reversal and resets the market's relative-strength map
content.disclaimer: This is a midday market digest, not investment advice. Please make your own final decisions.
